description_long: This modern bungalow features a striking combination of wood paneling and large glass windows, creating a warm yet contemporary aesthetic. The structure is composed of two main volumes with sloped roofs, one of which is a prominent gable, and the other a shed roof, both finished in contrasting shades of gray and white. The front facade includes a double garage, a central entrance, and a landscaped walkway bordered by low planters. The upper level features a balcony with glass railings, providing outdoor living space and visual interest. Large windows and sliding doors are distributed asymmetrically, maximizing natural light and views. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern wood-paneled bungalow with sloped roofs, large glass windows, a double garage, and landscaped planters, featuring a balcony and open, airy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, landscaped walkway, and a mix of gable and shed roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shed roof, vertical wood paneling, and the upper balcony with glass railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extensive glass windows, balcony, and the full length of the shed roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the gable roof, side entrance, and the continuation of the landscaped planters.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and balcony doors
